root_cause_found: The repo-consistency workflow used a pwsh shell for lightweight validators, so environments without pwsh could fail before the Python launcher-matrix fallback ran. The workflow now runs Python validators in the default shell and invokes start.ps1 through pwsh only when pwsh is available.
local_limitations: python -m pytest tests -q fails during collection because the active local Python environment lacks heavy science dependencies.
pwsh ./start.ps1 -ValidateMatrix -NoPause cannot run locally because pwsh is unavailable.

validation_commands.note: Collection fails on missing heavy science dependencies in the active local Python environment.

validation_commands.command: python -m pytest -q tests/test_final_paper_consistency_guardrails.py tests/test_no_draft_version_labels.py tests/test_validate_launcher_matrix.py tests/test_launcher_matrix_metadata.py tests/test_defense_claim_boundaries.py

validation_commands.note: Final-paper guardrails passed, including exact alignment fact checks.
27 launcher entries passed without writing reports.
No tracked-file hits; scan did not persist or print the literal label.

claim_boundaries_preserved: PyGNOME remains comparator-only and never observation truth.
DWH remains external transfer validation only, not Mindoro recalibration.
Mindoro B1 March 13-14 remains the only main Philippine public-observation validation claim.
p50 remains P >= 0.50 and the preferred probabilistic footprint.
